title: DX Docker build executor
description: Build Docker images with runtime tag and label expansion compatible with common CI metadata patterns.

args.description: Arguments appended to docker build. The inferred build target already provides the base image tag and Dockerfile arguments.

cwd.description: Working directory used as Docker build context.

env.description: Additional environment variables passed to the docker build command.

envFile.description: Optional .env-style file loaded before running docker build.

metadata.description: Additional labels and metadata-action style tag specifications resolved at runtime.

labels.description: Additional Docker labels expressed as key=value entries.

tags.description: Additional tags. Supports raw tags and common docker/metadata-action specs such as type=raw, type=semver, type=ref, and type=sha.

quiet.description: Suppress Docker stdout unless the command fails.
